rationale: Column-additive ALTER TABLE has an exact migration template at v15/v16 (session_store.py:580-583, :591-593); LIKE-substring matching is established in history_reader.py:301-303, :335-336; EPIC-2457 sibling precedent overwhelmingly favors widen-existing-tables over new join tables; ~50% less schema/migration/read-API surface than Option B (join table).
rule: Option A: Comma-separated TEXT in a single tag column
alternatives_rejected: Option B: join table commit_tags(commit_sha, tag) — only one join-table precedent (summary_spans); no GROUP BY-on-join-table read pattern in codebase; contradicts EPIC-2457 sibling precedent.
